title: Occultism Ritual Satchel
description: This mod backports​ the Ritual Satchel from Occultism 1.21.1 to 1.20.1.
body:
# Occultism Ritual Satchel

This is an unofficial port mod that adds the "Ritual Satchel"
from [Occultism](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/occultism) 1.21.1 to version 1.20.1.

## For Modpack Authors

If you are using this mod in your modpack and have added new rituals that involve new blocks, please ensure you add these new blocks to the `occultism_rs:pentacle_materials` block tag. This is necessary for the satchel to function
correctly.
